pagination.cursorDisclosure: This list loads one page at a time and does not show a total page count.

loading.title: Loading data
loading.message: The list is loading the latest data.

no-data.title: No data yet
no-data.message: There are no rows to show in the current scope.

no-matching-filters.title: No rows match the current filters
no-matching-filters.message: Try clearing filters or checking another tab.

no-permission.title: You do not have permission to view this data
no-permission.message: Contact an Admin if this access is needed for your work.

no-scope.title: No data in your assigned work scope
no-scope.message: Your work scope is assigned by Admin/Ops or the setup owner.

missing-profile.title: No linked employment profile
missing-profile.message: An Admin must link this login account to an employment profile before personal data can appear.

blocked-profile.title: Employment profile is not active for operations
blocked-profile.message: Data is shown only when the employment profile is in an operational status.

service-error.title: Could not load data
service-error.message: Try again. If the issue continues, contact the system administrator.

bounded-results.title: Results are shown by load
bounded-results.message: This list has no total page count; use Previous/Next to move between loaded result sets.

capabilities.missingPermission: You do not have permission to perform this action.
capabilities.missingScope: Your role assignment does not include the required scope.
capabilities.invalidStatus: This action is not available for the current record status.
capabilities.notWired: This action is not available yet.
capabilities.backendEnforced: Your permissions are checked again when you submit.

auth.loginSubtitle: Authentication is ready for Auth0 sign-in.

placeholders.foundationOnlyTitle: This page has a basic foundation layout
placeholders.waveStubSubtitle: Not yet implemented in this wave
placeholders.relatedSectionSubtitle: Related views are prepared for future module work
placeholders.relatedSectionMessage: Related lists are not available in this wave.
placeholders.actionRailPlaceholder: Detail actions are not available yet.
